summary: Completed testing of chat_enabled/reactions_enabled default values fix and geo-fencing functionality. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend CreateEvent form verified to have correct default values (chat_enabled=true, reactions_enabled=true, geo_restricted=false).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/events returns events with chat_enabled field
Backend: GET /api/events returns events with reactions_enabled field
Backend: GET /api/events/{event_id} returns chat_enabled and reactions_enabled fields
Backend: POST /api/events with chat_enabled=true creates event correctly
Backend: POST /api/events with chat_enabled=false creates event correctly
Backend: POST /api/events without chat_enabled defaults to True
Backend: POST /api/events/{event_id}/check-geo works for non-geo-restricted events
Backend: POST /api/events with geo_restricted=true creates geo-fenced event
Backend: Geo-check allows users at event location
Backend: Geo-check blocks users outside radius
Backend: GET /api/events/{event_id}/chat returns correct fields with reactions_enabled=True
Backend: GET /api/events/creator/my-events returns events with chat fields
Frontend: Chat toggle (Questions Only) is ON by default
Frontend: Reactions toggle (Live Reactions) is ON by default
Frontend: Geo-fencing toggle is OFF by default
critical_code_review_comments: Event model correctly defaults chat_enabled and reactions_enabled to True (lines 207-208)
EventCreate model correctly defaults chat_enabled and reactions_enabled to True (lines 240-241)
WebSocket chat endpoint correctly uses .get('chat_enabled', True) for default (line 2606)
All .get() calls for chat_enabled and reactions_enabled default to True
Frontend CreateEvent.jsx correctly initializes formData with chat_enabled: true and reactions_enabled: true (lines 54-55)
seed_data_creation: Test events created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat/reactions default values fix has been verified. Events now default to chat_enabled=True and reactions_enabled=True. WebSocket connections are accepted for events with either chat or reactions enabled. Geo-fencing functionality works correctly with radius-based location checking.

geo_fencing.radius_based_check: Working - uses Haversine formula for distance calculation
